objective: Test whether procedural commitment generalization emerges without shell ritualization, scalar rebound, or monoculture.

rollback_posture.artifact_preservation: full logs, resolved config, masking audit, eval reports retained

acceptable_regression_envelopes.heldout_exact_validity: no more than -0.02 absolute vs i9
acceptable_regression_envelopes.heldout_invalid_json: no more than +0.03 absolute vs i9
acceptable_regression_envelopes.scalar_direct_substitution_share: must not increase vs i9 baseline

false_progress_indicators: Exact-valid up while read_file exact-valid remains 0
Exact-valid gains concentrated in literal shell bucket
Lexical diversity rises but procedural diversity remains low

go_if: auditable weighted exposure control is implemented
or dataset is revised to reduce legacy dominance without doctrine drift
no_go_if: weighted exposure remains unsupported and dataset remains legacy-dominant

explicit_answers.safest_viable_microprobe_configuration: single 0.20-epoch probe from i9 checkpoint, canonical eval unchanged, telemetry-first stop/rollback gates
